title: UPI OC No 199 FY 24 25 – Update to NPCI CL version 1 8 or above
text:
Neel

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/OC no.199/2024-25 25 June 2024

To,

All Members,
UPI (Unified Payment Interface)

Dear Sir/Madam,

Subject: Update to NPCI CL version 1.8 or above

UPI has become a preferred digital payment mode across the country. It provides ease of use,
convenience and superior user experience with security and interoperability. To ensure the safety
and security of the UPI systems, NPCI constantly reviews the security checks of all components
in the UPI ecosystem and regularly upgrades them to address evolving threats in cyber
landscape.

There are security checks implemented as part of the code embedded in the Common Library
(CL) along with the feature release to enhance user experience on UPI platforms. Integration of
latest versions of CL is important to ensure enhanced security and safety in UPI ecosystem.

With this objective, NPCI will be retiring the support for CL prior to Version 1.8 after 30‘
September 2024.

To ensure compliance PSP Banks shall certify and enable CL 1.8 or above and their respective
UPI Apps shall integrate the latest version of CL within their application, on or before 30*
September 2024.

Members are requested to take note of this compliance and communicate it to relevant
stakeholders and their respective partners.

Yours sincerely,
SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products

1001A, The Capital, B Wing, 10° Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai 400 051.
